symptoms: A dog bit my hand last week and now the wound tingles and burns. I have a fever, feel very anxious, and every time I try to drink water my throat spasms and I panic.
After a bat bite on my ankle, I developed headache, low fever, and strange tingling at the bite site. I am confused, drooling, and I cannot swallow water without choking.
I was scratched by a stray dog and felt fine at first, but now the old bite spot itches and hurts. I am agitated, scared of water, and my arms are starting to feel weak.
The bite on my forearm healed, then I got fever and numbness around that area. Now I am restless, hallucinating, and having trouble swallowing liquids.
Since being bitten by a puppy, I have pain and tingling where it happened, severe anxiety, and a pounding headache. Seeing water makes me panic and my legs feel like they are getting paralyzed.
A few days after a bat exposure, my hand started tingling and I developed fever and weakness. I am confused, producing a lot of saliva, and even small sips of water trigger spasms.
I have fever and headache after an animal bite, and the bite site now burns and feels numb. I am becoming irritable, cannot tolerate water, and my neck and limbs are getting stiff and weak.
The scratch on my leg from a stray dog seemed minor, but now it tingles and I have fever. I feel terrified when water is near me and my swallowing muscles keep tightening.
After a bite on my calf, I developed tingling at the wound, confusion, and trouble sleeping. I am drooling, afraid to drink, and my legs are starting to feel heavy and weak.
I was bitten by a bat and now the old wound aches with pins-and-needles. I have fever, agitation, and painful spasms in my throat whenever I try to swallow water.
A dog bite on my finger healed, but now that area itches and tingles again. I feel anxious and confused, and I keep choking when I try to drink.
The place where an animal bit me feels painful and numb, and I started getting fever yesterday. Today I am hallucinating, avoiding water, and feeling progressive weakness.
I got nipped by a stray dog and now I have headache, fever, and tingling around the bite mark. I am unusually restless and even the sight of water makes me panic.
Since a bat bit my wrist, I have burning at the bite site, fever, and severe discomfort. I cannot swallow liquids, I am drooling, and I feel confused.
Weeks after a dog bite, I developed fever and prickling around the healed wound. Now I have hydrophobia, muscle spasms, and weakness that is spreading.
The bite on my shoulder started tingling again and I now have fever and headache. I am very agitated, cannot drink water, and my face and arms feel weak.
I feel sick after an animal bite: fever, anxiety, and a strange itching pain where I was bitten. I keep gagging on water and my body feels increasingly weak.
After being scratched by a bat, I developed tingling at the scratch, confusion, and too much saliva. Water scares me because swallowing sets off spasms in my throat.
I was bitten by a dog and now the old wound burns and tingles. I have fever, insomnia, and episodes of panic whenever I try to take a sip of water.
There is numbness and pain where an animal bit me, along with fever and headache. I am acting confused, avoiding water, and my legs are becoming paralyzed.
The bite on my foot has pins-and-needles, and now I have fever and strange behavior. I snap at people, cannot swallow water, and I feel weakness moving up my legs.
After a dog bite, I developed tingling at the bite site, agitation, and severe trouble drinking. My throat spasms when I see water and I am getting weaker.
My healed bite wound suddenly started itching and burning. I have fever, confusion, and fear of water, and my arms feel like they are losing strength.
Since a bat bite, I have fever, headache, and numbness around the wound. Liquids trigger choking, I am drooling, and I feel episodes of delirium.
I was bitten by a stray animal and now the bite site tingles and hurts. I am anxious, hydrophobic, and my muscles feel weak and hard to control.
The scratch from a dog on my hand started burning again, and I now have fever and confusion. I panic around water and my swallowing muscles lock up.
After exposure to a bat bite, I got headache, low fever, and tingling where I was bitten. I am hallucinating and cannot drink because my throat keeps spasming.
A dog bite on my arm healed, but now I have pain there, fever, and extreme restlessness. Water frightens me and my legs are starting to give out.
The wound from an animal bite feels numb and prickly, and I developed fever overnight. I am confused, drooling, and getting progressive paralysis.
Since a bite from a stray dog, I have fever, tingling at the wound, and severe anxiety. I cannot swallow water and I am having episodes of agitation and weakness.
I have headache and fever after a bite, and the bite site has burning tingling pain. The sight of water makes me choke and panic.
An old dog bite is now painful and itchy, and I suddenly became confused and feverish. I have hydrophobia and weakness spreading through my limbs.
The bat bite on my leg started tingling, then I got fever and trouble sleeping. Now I am hallucinating, drooling, and unable to drink water.
After being bitten by an animal, the wound became numb and painful again. I feel anxious, restless, and my muscles are becoming weak and partly paralyzed.
I have fever and tingling where a dog bit me, plus headache and irritability. Drinking water triggers throat spasms and I feel like my body is shutting down.
Weeks after a bat bite, I developed itching and pins-and-needles at the site. I am confused, scared of water, and starting to lose movement in my legs.
The scratch on my arm from a stray dog now burns and tingles. I have fever, excessive saliva, and I gag whenever I try to drink.
Since an animal bite, I have numbness at the wound, agitation, and fever. I cannot swallow liquids and my arms feel increasingly weak.
I was bitten by a dog and now I have pain and tingling at the old wound, confusion, and hydrophobia. My muscles are getting weak and stiff.
After a bat bite, I developed fever, headache, and a tingling bite site. I am terrified of water, having throat spasms, and feeling progressive paralysis.
